title: carya ovata f. fraxinifolia
intro: Carya ovata f. fraxinifolia, also known as the Northern Shagbark Hickory, is a deciduous tree species belonging to the Juglandaceae family. The medicinal properties of this plant are primarily attributed to its bark, which contains flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, offering anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carya ovata f. fraxinifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
